name: PopoverBodyComponent
description:
A component used to enforce a certain layout for the popover.
```html
<fd-popover>
    <fd-popover-control>Control Element</fd-popover-control>
    <fd-popover-body>Popover Body</fd-popover-body>
</fd-popover>
```

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Maximum height of the popover body element.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Maximum width of the popover body element.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: Minimum height of the popover body element.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: Minimum width of the popover body element.

outputs.name: onClose
outputs.description: Event emitted when popover body requests to be closed (e.g., Escape key press)
